name: startValuesUpdateList
title: startValuesUpdateList
syntax: void startValuesUpdateList(char groupName[], long onlyActiveStartValues); // form 3
description: Sets the start values of variables/signals in the CANoeStart Value Window to the currently measured values.

parameters.name: groupName
parameters.description: Name of a group containing start values. If groupName is defined, then only the active start values contained in this group get the currently measured values. If groupName is not defined or is equal to "", then only the active start values of all groups get the currently measured values.

parameters.name: onlyActiveStartValues
parameters.description: Determines if active start values get the currently measured values or not. If missing, then only the active start values are considered. 1 : Only the active start values get the currently measured values. 0: All start values (active and inactive) get the currently measured values.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
